pull_requests.title: feat: pubspec auditing, sibling dep conversion, and CI template updates
pull_requests.author: tsavo-knott
pull_requests.summary: Introduces pubspec dependency auditing commands, adds sibling dependency conversion for multi-package releases, and updates CI workflow templates.

pull_requests.title: fix: comprehensive audit fixes - cross-platform hashing, CI hardening, test suite
pull_requests.author: tsavo-knott
pull_requests.summary: Fixes cross-platform hashing using pure-Dart crypto, improves CI template security by masking PATs, normalizes CRLF, and adds extensive test coverage for WorkflowGenerator.
